_comment: Backends the hosted console probes on load, in order. The first one that answers /health wins,
and is remembered in localStorage for subsequent visits.
After deploying the API (see render.yaml), put its URL first in this list, rebuild the frontend
and push to the gh-pages branch — then the public link is live for everyone with no further
You can also skip the rebuild entirely and share a pinned link:
If none of these answer, the console serves the recorded session instead of breaking.
